---
title: "Jeffrey Hsu"
subtitle: "Digital Marketing | Marketing Analytics | Data Storytelling"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: "images/jeffrey-headshot.png"
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 14em
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/hsujeffrey
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/
format:
  html:
    theme:
      - cosmo
      - theme.scss
---

::: {.highlight-box}
I am currently pursuing a **Master of Science in Digital Marketing at Cal Poly Pomona**, with a focus on **marketing analytics, dashboard reporting, digital strategy, and data storytelling**.
:::

My portfolio is designed for employers and professionals looking for someone who can connect marketing strategy with data-driven decision-making. I am interested in roles related to **marketing analytics, performance marketing, digital strategy, campaign reporting, and content performance analysis**.

## Career Focus

I want to build a career where I can use data to improve marketing decisions. My strongest interest is in helping organizations understand what is working, what is underperforming, and where they should focus next.

I am especially interested in marketing performance dashboards, attribution analysis, website traffic analytics, SEO and paid media reporting, and turning technical analysis into clear business recommendations that teams can actually use.

## Portfolio Highlights

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="33%"}

::: {.project-card}
<span class="section-tag">Digital Marketing</span>

My digital marketing work focuses on campaign strategy, content planning, SEO, audience targeting, and customer engagement.

:::

:::

::: {.column width="33%"}

::: {.project-card}
<span class="section-tag">Marketing Analytics</span>

My analytics work focuses on dashboards, attribution modeling, website traffic analysis, and reproducible reporting using **R, Quarto, GA4, BigQuery, and Looker Studio**.

:::

:::

::: {.column width="33%"}

::: {.project-card}
<span class="section-tag">Presentation Work</span>

My presentation work shows how I explain technical concepts clearly through professional slide design and data storytelling.

:::

:::

:::

## Skills

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="33%"}

::: {.project-card}
<span class="section-tag">Marketing & Analytics</span>

**KPI Analysis**  
Interpreting marketing performance metrics to support better decisions.

**Content Analysis**  
Evaluating engagement, audience behavior, and campaign performance.

**Campaign Optimization**  
Identifying trends, strengths, and opportunities across campaigns.

:::

:::

::: {.column width="33%"}

::: {.project-card}
<span class="section-tag">Technical Skills</span>

**R Programming**  
Data cleaning, visualization, reporting, and basic modeling.

**Dashboard Development**  
Building reports with Quarto, GA4, BigQuery, and Looker Studio.

**Data Visualization**  
Creating clear visuals for technical and non-technical audiences.

:::

:::

::: {.column width="33%"}

::: {.project-card}
<span class="section-tag">Communication</span>

**Business Storytelling**  
Translating analysis into understandable recommendations.

**Presentation Skills**  
Presenting dashboards, reports, and findings professionally.

**Strategic Thinking**  
Connecting marketing insights with broader business goals.

:::

:::

:::

## Education

::: {.project-card}
<span class="section-tag">Education</span>

### California State Polytechnic University, Pomona

**Master of Science in Digital Marketing**

Coursework and projects have focused on digital marketing strategy, marketing analytics, dashboard development, attribution modeling, web analytics, and reproducible reporting.

:::

## Professional Direction

::: {.highlight-box}
I want to work in a role where I can combine marketing, analytics, and communication to help teams make smarter, data-informed decisions through reporting, dashboards, and strategic analysis.
:::

## Explore My Work

Use the navigation menu to explore my **Digital Marketing**, **Marketing Analytics**, **Resume**, **Presentation**, and **Website Traffic Analytics** pages.
